title: Vanilla+ Essentials
description: Essential mods for an enhanced Vanilla experience.
body: **Vanilla+ Essentials** is a meticulously curated Minecraft Java modpack designed to enhance your Vanilla gameplay experience. Featuring essential mods that seamlessly integrate with the core game, **Vanilla+ Essentials** adds quality-of-life improvements, performance optimizations, and subtle new features. Enjoy a more immersive and enriched Minecraft adventure while preserving the charm of the original game. Perfect for players seeking a familiar yet refined experience.
